title: Why Mettler-Toledo (MTD) is a Top Growth Stock for the Long-Term
text: Wondering how to pick strong, market-beating stocks for your investment portfolio? Look no further than the Zacks Style Scores.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Q2 Earnings & Sales Beat, Increase Y/Y
text: Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) second-quarter 2022 results benefit from robust Laboratory and Industrial segments, and solid momentum across the Americas and Asia.
